scientific_question: Does A447's frozen solver-native proof-antecedent Reader transfer without refitting from its 32 development targets to the 96 unmeasured targets, and what complete-128 proof portfolio should be carried target-blind into W52?

corpus_contract.reused_A447_targets: source-local indices divisible by four: 4 per fixed block, 32 total
corpus_contract.new_A448_targets: all remaining source-local indices: 12 per fixed block, 96 total
corpus_contract.exact_measurement_contract: same content-addressed A447 helper, CNF mapping, numeric candidate order, horizons 1/2/4/8, watchdog, parser, and typed feature extractor

prospective_no_refit_transfer.ties: A442 Borda rank then numeric cell index
prospective_no_refit_transfer.primary_claim_scope: the fixed A447 primary operator on the disjoint remaining96 evaluation

complete128_model_contract.outer_crossfit: hold out one complete sixteen-target block; feature selection uses the other 112 targets only
complete128_model_contract.operators: the same fixed A447 operator panel
complete128_model_contract.final_W52_model: fit the feature order on all 128 labels only after no-refit transfer evaluation and retain the strongest qualifying proof-derived operator as a target-blind portfolio member

proof_transfer_gate: at least one fixed A447 proof-derived operator is positive in all eight disjoint remaining96 blocks
its remaining96 balanced eight-block gain is at least 0.25 bits
its remaining96 rank field differs from the A442 Borda field
complete128_crossfit_gate: at least one proof-derived crossfit operator is positive in all eight complete blocks
its complete128 balanced gain is at least 0.25 bits
W52_open_gate.if_either_signal_gate_passes: open target-blind W52 proof tracing as a portfolio beside the fixed A442 Borda Reader; do not replace or erase the baseline
W52_open_gate.if_both_signal_gates_fail: retain the complete proof corpus and resolve the stable h8 position-5/position-4 ancestry subgraph before W52
